tools.name: apv.retrieve_information
tools.description: Use this tool to retrieve precise, up to date, expert validated information about Chilean APV (Ahorro Previsional Voluntario). This includes information about: - Differences between APV regime A and B - Tax benefits and deductions - Eligibility requirements and contribution limits - PPR benefits for retirees - How APV affects retirement savings - Withdrawal rules and conditions - Comparisons between pension savings products. Use this when the user wants to understand or learn about these pension mechanisms, not when they want to calculate or optimize.

tools.name: apv.simulate
tools.description: Use this tool to display an interactive APV Simulator widget. The user can input their gender, age, taxable income, and monthly contribution to see projected savings and pension increase. You can optionally provide starting values if the user has mentioned them.

tools.name: ppr.retrieve_information
tools.description: Use this tool to retrieve precise, up to date, expert validated information about Mexican PPR (Plan Personal de Retiro). This includes information about: - Tax benefits and ISR deductions - Eligibility requirements and age limits (18-65 years) - Investment structure- Withdrawal rules and tax implications - Comparison with AFORE - Regulatory framework (CNBV, LISR Article 151, SAT) - Fintual's PPR advantages, fees, and features - Risk level adjustments and deposit handling - Transfers from PPP (corporate pension plans) to PPR. Use this when the user wants to understand or learn about these Mexican pension mechanisms, not when they want to calculate or optimize.

tools.name: ppr.simulate
tools.description: Use this tool to display an interactive PPR Simulator widget. The user can input their age, monthly income, and monthly contribution to see projected savings, pension increase, and tax benefits. You can optionally provide starting values if the user has mentioned them.

tools.name: cl_funds.retrieve_information
tools.description: Use this tool when user wants to know specific information about Fintual's Chilean mutual funds products, their compositions, strategies, or allocations.Do not use this tool to know general APV information, use the apv.retrieve_information tool instead.This includes information about: - APV series- Fund compositions and investment positions (what assets each fund holds) - Geographical distribution (country allocations) - Industry/sector allocations - Historical performance and returns - Investment strategies and philosophies - Fee structures for regular and APV series - Diversification principles and asset management approach.

tools.name: mx_funds.retrieve_information
tools.description: Use this tool when user wants to know specific information about Fintual's Mexican investment funds products, their compositions, strategies, or allocations.Do not use this tool to know general PPR information, use the ppr.retrieve_information tool instead.This includes information about: - PPR series (E10F for Risky Hayek and Moderate Portman) - Fund compositions and investment positions (what assets each fund holds) - Geographical distribution (country allocations) - Industry/sector allocations - Historical performance and returns - Investment strategies and philosophies - Fee structures for regular and PPR series - Diversification principles and asset management approach.
